# Copilot Area 05 Instructions

Work only inside `github-copilot/cybersecurity/defensive-security-operations-detection-intelligence/`.

Generate static SOC operating models, telemetry requirements, logging coverage maps, detection specs, validation plans, lifecycle records, alert triage records, hunt plans/reports, intelligence assessments, defensive malware-analysis plans, SOAR playbook designs, coverage assessments, KPI/KRI definitions, quality reviews, escalation records, and assurance records.

Do not connect to live security systems, query telemetry, execute hunts, deploy rules, close alerts, isolate hosts, block indicators, delete data, contain incidents, access malware, execute malware, authenticate, install dependencies, run generated files, publish, or push. Declared incidents transfer primary ownership to Incident Response, DFIR, and Recovery.
